raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Es gann fazziju: Ka war-
refchu es tewi starp teem Behr-
neem eezelt? un tew doht to mih-
ligu Semmi/ to skaistu Jhpa-
schunu/ to Paganu Spehku?
Bet es fazziju / tu peefaukki
manni: Mans Tehws/ un ne
nowehrsifees wairs no pakla-
tenes.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pateefi / itt ka dascha
Seewa farwam Drangam neper-
tizziga irr/ ta effat juhs nepetiz-
zigi prett mannt turrejfschees /
juhs no ta Israëta Namina /
fakka tas KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Weena Balkfne taps dsir-
deta us teem Augstumeem/ wee-
na Randaschana nn Schehlo-
schana to Israëta Behrnn / ka
tee farwu Zettu irr pahrwehrtij-
schi/ un to KUNGU farwu Dee-
wu afsmirtufchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Atgreeceetees juhs atkah-
paji Behrnt/ es dseedinaschn juh-
fas Atkahpschanas. Raugi/
scheit effam mehs/ mehs nahkam
pee tewis/ jo tu effi tas KUNgs
muhfu Deews.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 23,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Pateefi / tas irr Wiltus
ar Pakalneem/ un ar Pulku to
Kalnu. Pateefi/ eekfch ta KUN-
GA muhfu Deewa irr Israëta
Pestifschana.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 24,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo tas Rauna Darbs irr
to Darbu muhfu Tehwu apehdts
no muhfas Jaunibas / winnu
"
    },
    {
      "n": 25,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Mehs gullam eekfch fa-
wa Rauna/ un muhfu Apkan-
otchana apklahj muhs. Jo mehs
effam prett to KUNGU muhfu
Deewu grehkojtchi / mehs un
muhfu Tehwi no muhfas Jaun-
nibas lihds schodeen / un mehs ue
effim tai Balkfnei ta KUNGA
muhfu Deewa paklaufsigt bi-
justhi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta IV. Nodalla.
Paskebbinaischana pee Atgreechanaas no Greh-
keem/ un pee garriagss Avgraisischanaas tahs
Sirds: 1. Na arri weena gauscha Pabeedi-
nafchana/ ja tee ne gribbesees atgreestees no
Grehkeem/tad taps tee aprichti no teemKalde-
exeem :5/ 14/ 19/30.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "A tu gribbi atgreestees
Israëls / fakka tas
KUNGS: Tad atgree-
fees pee mannim/ uu ja tu fa-
wu Negantibu no mannas Preek-
schas gribbi atjeint / tad tu ne
wasafees.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Tad tu swehresi: Tik tec-
schant ka tas KUNGS dsihwo/
ar Pateefbu/ ar Teefu / un ar
Taisnibu/ un tee Pagant taps
eekfch winna twehtiti / un leeli-
fees eekfch winna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo ta fakka tas KUNGS
uhs teem Wihrreim no Juha
un Jerusalemes : Axreet jums
jannt Semmi/ un ne fehjeet
Ehrfschku Starpa.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Avgraisajtees tant KUR-
GAM / un atnemmeet nohft to
Preekfsch-Ahdu juhsu Sirschu /
juhs
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
